title: cscK Metrics and the $J$-equation on Toric Blowups
body:
This site presents interactive visualisations of precomputed results from a research project on the existence of constant scalar curvature Kähler (cscK) metrics and solutions to the $J$-equation on blowups of toric surfaces. 

scalar quantity $J$

Kähler potential $\phi$

Ricci curvature $\mathrm{Ric}(\omega)$

real parameter $\lambda$

limit at infinity $t \to \infty$

compact complex manifold $X$

Kähler form $\omega$

first Chern class $c_1(L)$

scalar curvature $S(\omega)$

average scalar curvature $\hat{S}$

sequence ${u_k}$

Laplace operator $\Delta$

exponential function $e^{u_k}$

domain $\Omega$

gradient norm $|\nabla u|^2$

integral over domain $\int_\Omega u , dx$

Lagrange multiplier $\lambda$

Euler–Lagrange equation $-\Delta u + \lambda = 0$
